notes: Hand-annotated question set for Recall@5 / Recall@10. Each question's expectedChunkIndices points to the canonical discussion chunk in chunks.preview.md (appendix repeats are intentionally ignored to make Recall stricter).

questions.question: What is the primary goal of AI Document Assistant?
Which library is used to extract text from PDFs?
What chunk size and overlap does the chunking strategy use?
Why does the project use token-based chunking instead of a character heuristic?
Which embedding model is used and how many dimensions does it return?
What batch size is used for embedding requests?
Why does the VectorStore interface receive embeddings instead of raw text?
Which two storage backends implement the VectorStore interface?
Which retrieval techniques are listed as not currently implemented?
What does the model say when the answer is not in the retrieved context?
When is the chat cleared, and why?
What pricing assumptions are configured for embeddings and chat generation?
What metrics does the benchmark report?
What are the project's intentional non-goals?
What internationalization work is planned in the future?
